description_long: This is a modern, monolithic bench with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded ends, crafted from a single block of what appears to be polished stone or concrete. The seat is flat and broad, providing ample space for multiple people to sit comfortably. The bench features a distinctive open space beneath the seat, formed by two wide, curved cutouts on either side, giving it a minimalist and airy appearance. The surface is smooth and slightly reflective, suggesting a high-quality finish that is both durable and easy to clean. There are no visible backrests or armrests, emphasizing its simple, functional design. This type of bench is commonly found in urban parks, plazas, or along sidewalks, where it serves as a robust and weather-resistant seating option.
description: A sleek, rectangular stone or concrete bench with rounded ends and open curved cutouts beneath the seat, featuring a smooth, polished surface and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, the flat seat, and the wide curved cutouts beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded end and the solid, block-like profile of the bench.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the flat seat and open space beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with the same rounded end and solid profile.
